Is this for firefox-56.0.2_3,1 ? I can't reproduce. Please, show JS backtrace.

Binary packages are built every 2 days at 01:00 UTC. comment 2 didn't land in time, so expect the package no sooner than 2017-10-28. -RELEASE users are on /quarterly by default, so I also need to MFH to 2017Q4.
